import React from 'react'; import { TrendingUp, Bell, CheckCircle, Calendar, Clock, Star, Users } from 'lucide-react'; /** * DashboardPreview component - Shows beautiful leave balance cards and smart insights * @param {Object} props - Component props * @param {Object} props.leaveBalances - Object with EL, SL, CL balances * @param {Array} props.holidays - Array of holiday objects * @param {Array} props.vacations - Array of vacation objects * @param {Function} props.onNavigateToDate - Function to navigate to specific date * @param {Function} props.onUpdateLeaveBalances - Function to update leave balances * @param {boolean} props.isLoading - Loading state */ const DashboardPreview = ({ leaveBalances = { EL: 12, SL: 8, CL: 3 }, holidays = [], vacations = [], onNavigateToDate, onUpdateLeaveBalances, isLoading = false, children // This will be the Calendar component }) => { return (
{/* Dashboard Header */}

PlanWise Dashboard

Welcome back, Sarah!

{/* Left Column: Calendar */}
{children}
{/* Right Column: Leave Balances & Smart Insights */}
{/* Leave Balances Panel */}

Leave Balances

{/* Earned Leave Card */}
Earned Leave
{leaveBalances.EL} days
{/* Sick Leave Card */}
Sick Leave
{leaveBalances.SL} days
{/* Casual Leave Card */}
Casual Leave
{leaveBalances.CL} days
{/* Smart Insights Panel */}

Smart Insights

{/* Long Weekend Alert */}
Long Weekend Detected!

Mar 15-18 (4 days off)

{/* Optimal Booking */}
Optimal Booking

Book flights 2 weeks early

{/* Team Sync */}
Team Sync

3 colleagues also planning leave

); }; export default DashboardPreview;
